title: Using AI to outsmart drug-resistant bacteria
summary: Ben Luisi's team at Cambridge uses AlphaFold and Gemini to analyze bacterial defense mechanisms and identify new antibiotic targets. The AI-driven approach compresses structural analysis from years to minutes, addressing the global challenge of antimicrobial resistance.
